title: Jenny Kissed Me
content:
Jenny kissed me when we met,
Jumping from the chair she sat in;
Time, you thief, who love to get
Sweets into your list, put that in!
Say I�m weary, say I�m sad,
Say that health and wealth have missed me,
Say I�m growing old, but add,
Jenny kissed me.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, James Henry Leigh Hunt delivers a powerful performance in "Jenny Kissed Me"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
